name: [GRIDHAND] Internal Ops Agent - License/certification expiring → 30 day warning → assign ren

gridhand.scenario: License/certification expiring → 30 day warning → assign renewal task
gridhand.description: When a barber's professional license is approaching expiration, 30 days prior to the deadline, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a notification to the shop owner's email and creating a task in their calendar to renew the license, ensuring timely completion of the renewal process and avoiding any potential disruption to their business. As the task is assigned, the system also sends a reminder to the owner to gather all necessary documents and fees, streamlining the renewal process. By automating this critical reminder, the barber shop owner can focus on serving customers, confident that their licenses are up to date and their business remains compliant with regulatory requirements.
